basic_details.short_information: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore (FACT) has officially announced the Engineer (Chemical) Recruitment 2026 with multiple openings. The detailed notification was published on the official FACT website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 26 years and hold a Graduate qualification can participate in the walk-in selection process scheduled for 18 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and check walk-in details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 26 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST - 5 years, OBC (NCL) - 3 years, Ex-Service personnel - As per GOI guidelines.

qualification.details: Engineer (Chemical): Bachelor's Degree in Chemical Engineering or Petrochemical Engineering or Chemical Technology or Petrochemical Technology or Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering or Polymer Technology. Preference will be given to those who have completed Apprenticeship Training in the prescribed qualification in FACT and submitted COP (Certificate of Proficiency issued by Directorate General of Training).

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of Rs.31,000/- per month Increase of 3% on successful completion of each year Leave, ESI, Provident Fund, TA & DA applicable based on eligibility as per Company Rules

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FACT Engineer (Chemical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply and attend the walk-in selection for the Engineer (Chemical) post is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure they complete all formalities by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Engineer (Chemical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Chemical Engineering or Petrochemical Engineering or Chemical Technology or Petrochemical Technology or Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering or Polymer Technology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Engineer (Chemical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Engineer (Chemical) post is 26 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, OBC (NCL), and Ex-Service personnel as per government directives.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Engineer (Chemical) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 31,000/- per month, with a 3% annual increase. Other benefits like leave, ESI, and PF are applicable as per company rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the FACT Engineer (Chemical) vacancy?
faq.answer: The application process involves online registration followed by a walk-in selection. Candidates need to register online, fill the application form, and attend the walk-in interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview for FACT Engineer (Chemical) recruitment scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the HR Department, FEDO Buildings, Eloor, Udyogamandal-683501, Kerala.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any preference given to candidates with specific training?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have completed Apprenticeship Training in the prescribed qualification in FACT and submitted their Certificate of Proficiency (COP).

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in selection?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original certificates and self-attested copies of all relevant documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis for the Engineer (Chemical) position at FACT.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 03/2026.
